top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND E.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND P.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE P.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND E.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND E.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) THEN 1 END) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND P.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE P.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND E.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND E.Diagnosis = 'SLE' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient P
    INNER JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
    INNER JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN l.GOT > 40 AND e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.GOT > (SELECT AVG(GOT) FROM Laboratory) AND E.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;
